zh.Etton,York,England: 英國英格蘭越可爾艾頓
zh.of, Tickhill, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾迪可爾
zh.lifeSummary: Thomas de Etton是Geoffrey de Etton的兒子，於1154年出生。他於從大約1192年到1197年與Agnes de Percy在英國英格蘭越可爾艾頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1235年享年81歲。

zh-hans.of, Tickhill, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾迪可爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Thomas de Etton是Geoffrey de Etton的儿子，于1154年出生。他于从大约1192年到1197年与Agnes de Percy在英国英格兰越可爾艾頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1235年享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Etton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called Elton (Berkshire, Cheshire, Derbyshire, Durham, Herefordshire, Huntingdonshire, Lancashire, and Nottinghamshire). The Eltons in Chesire, Derbyshire, and Durham are from Old English ǣl ‘eel’ + tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’. Elton in Berkshire is from the Old English female personal name Æthelflǣd (composed of the elements æthel ‘noble’ + flǣd ‘beauty’). Both Elton in Herefordshire and in Nottinghamshire are from the Old English personal name Ella + tūn. The Berkshire origin for the surname is especially well represented.
Norwegian: habitational name from a farm name in eastern Norway, in Old Norse Elgjartún ‘enclosed sacred place’ (or fenced in for elg ‘moose’?).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: Thomas de Etton was born in 1154 as the son of Geoffrey de Etton. He married Agnes de Percy from about 1192 to 1197, in Etton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1235, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Thomas d’Etton est né en 1154, fils de Geoffrey d’Etton. Il a épousé Agnes de Percy du environ 1192 au 1197, à Etton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1235, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Thomas de Etton wurde 1154, als Sohn von Geoffrey de Etton geboren. Er hat von um 1192 bis 1197 in Etton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Agnes de Percy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1235 im Alter von 81 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Thomas de Etton è nato il nel 1154 come figlio di Geoffrey de Etton. Lui sposato Agnes de Percy da circa 1192 a 1197, nel Etton, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1235, all'età di 81 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Ettonは1154年にGeoffrey de Ettonの息子として生まれた。から約1192年まで1197年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアエットオンでAgnes de Percyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1235年に81歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Etton(은)는 1154년 Geoffrey de Etton의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1192년 부터 1197년 까지 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 턴에서 Agnes de Percy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1235년 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Thomas de Etton nasceu em 1154 filho de Geoffrey de Etton. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Percy de aproximadamente 1192 a 1197, em Etton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1235, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Thomas de Etton родился в 1154 г. Его отца звали Geoffrey de Etton. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Percy с около 1192 по 1197 в местности эттон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1235 г. в возрасте 81 год.

es.lifeSummary: Thomas de Etton nació en 1154 como hijo de Geoffrey de Etton. Se casó con Agnes de Percy desde aproximadamente 1192 hasta 1197, en Etton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1235, a la edad de 81 años.
